name: Project AMHG-88 Multi-Harvesting Generator Industrial Bill of Materials

structural_containment_and_heavy_metallu.specification: Particle Size: 15-45 microns, Vacuum Induction Melted, ASTM F3055 Standard
structural_containment_and_heavy_metallu.purpose: Primary metal substrate for Direct Metal Laser Sintering (DMLS) of the high-strength AMHG-01 convective solar intake mouth and AMHG-02 accelerator casing

structural_containment_and_heavy_metallu.specification: Gas-Pressure Sintered (GPSS) Solid Blank Sleeve, High Density, Dielectric Breakdown Strength > 25 kV/mm, ASTM C1161 Standard
structural_containment_and_heavy_metallu.purpose: Provides the ultra-hard, non-conductive internal blast shield lining to entirely isolate the 75,000V DC static fields from grounding against the chassis

multi_source_electrical_harvesting_and_b.specification: 99.99% Pure High-Conductivity Copper, Heavy Gauge, Thickness: 2.0mm, Dead-Soft Temper Standard
multi_source_electrical_harvesting_and_b.purpose: Forms the primary high-voltage positive and negative collection grids within the AMHG-03 manifold to safely channel drawn atmospheric currents

multi_source_electrical_harvesting_and_b.specification: P-type and N-type Elements, Doped for High-Temperature Differential Performance up to 400C, Gold-Plated Copper Contacts
multi_source_electrical_harvesting_and_b.purpose: Populates the concentric outer shell of the AMHG-03 combiner core to drive the 128-pair thermal flywheel loop

multi_source_electrical_harvesting_and_b.item: Piezoelectric PVDF High-Polymer Metallized Film Sheets
multi_source_electrical_harvesting_and_b.specification: Thickness: 28 microns, Poling Strain Vector d33: 33 pC/N, High-Temperature Metallized Aluminum Contact Pads
multi_source_electrical_harvesting_and_b.purpose: Constructs the secondary acoustic noise recovery and shockwave strain loops behind the internal ceramic liners to provide 42 dB dampening

extreme_pressure_hydraulic_seals_and_mic.specification: Self-Energizing Profile, Outer Diameter: 150.0mm, Section Cross-Thickness: 3.2mm
extreme_pressure_hydraulic_seals_and_mic.purpose: Establishes a permanent gas-tight metallic compression seal at the primary inter-module superalloy flange splits

extreme_pressure_hydraulic_seals_and_mic.specification: Durometer Hardness: 80A, Certified Operating Temperature Range: -60C to 200C
extreme_pressure_hydraulic_seals_and_mic.purpose: Provides flexible, air-tight secondary backup sealing bounds inside the outer coaxial counter-current pre-heating jackets

extreme_pressure_hydraulic_seals_and_mic.specification: Porosity: 5 microns, High-Temperature Diffusion-Bonded Matrix Discs
extreme_pressure_hydraulic_seals_and_mic.purpose: Positioned inside the AMHG-01 air intake plenum entrance mouth to completely trap micro-dust and sand particles before fluid acceleration
